text.title: CD Pipelines and Deployment Strategies Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: One job called 'ci-cd' runs build+test+deploy; can only retry whole pipeline.
antipattern.fix: Split into discrete jobs with needs: dependencies; each is retriable independently.

antipattern.symptom: Bad deploy in prod; rollback requires manual SSH + git checkout + redeploy.
antipattern.fix: Add ./scripts/deploy.sh --rollback that flips to previous artifact + runs migration rollback.

antipattern.symptom: Canary step proceeds before pod warmup; 5% of traffic sees 503.
antipattern.root-cause: Health check gate omitted between canary steps.
antipattern.fix: Wait on /healthz returning 200 with new version after every traffic shift.
